hero.name: Aplete

videos.title: You Better Lay Low (with Kella T.)

story.heading: The Story
paragraphs: Aplete is the solo universe of Stefano Kajatt, a Las Vegas multi-instrumentalist who also leads the band and recording collective Trust in the Sun. The name holds more than a discography: Aplete is where Kajatt shares whatever he is making — songs first, but also art, ideas, and works-in-progress from One Sky Ally, the umbrella for his creative projects.

The streaming catalogue is small and deliberate: 'Little Bird' (2022), 'You Better Lay Low' with Kella T. (2023), and 'FIOH, Vol. 1' (2024) — three pieces ('In Harmony', 'Mending's Meditation', 'A Concord Goodbye') written for FIOH, a One Sky Ally project. Off the charts, the SoundCloud page runs deeper: twenty-eight tracks of originals, sketches and covers, from 'Hand in Hand' to takes on 'Jolene', 'Hallelujah' and 'Song to the Siren'.

Aplete also turns up in other people's worlds — with River Rhythm on 'Lotus Pond' and 'Mystery of Life', with Red Grooves on 'When We All Are One', with Souza on 'Closure', and with Christina Lakis on 'Tunnel Vision'.
EDIT-ME: where the name Aplete comes from, and what this project means to Stefano — in his own words.
EDIT-ME: what is in motion right now — the art, the ideas, the One Sky Ally works-in-progress this universe will share next.

shows.upcomingNote: Aplete has no tracked live dates — Stefano plays around Las Vegas with Trust in the Sun; word of appearances travels through the band's channels.
